note: Converts dead cards into 0-cost Shivs. Exceptional for fueling 'cards played' damage scaling like Serpent Form or on-hit scaling like Envenom.

core_engine_observations.engine_mechanic: spamming zero-cost attacks and card cycle to trigger continuous per-card-played damage and per-attack poison stacking
core_engine_observations.notes: Serpent Form and Envenom turned every card played, especially 0-cost Shivs generated by Leading Strike and Hidden Daggers, into massive automatic damage and poison scaling.

build_role_observations.evidence: Generated Shivs for 0 energy while discarding cards to trigger Sly effects like Haze+.

note_history.note: Converts dead cards into 0-cost Shivs. Exceptional for fueling 'cards played' damage scaling like Serpent Form or on-hit scaling like Envenom.
note_history.reason: Generates Shivs to trigger power synergies
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R2: 'Hidden Daggers generates 0-cost attacks... for extra serpent form damage and envenom poison'

note: 0-cost skill offering temporary Dexterity. Great for free block scaling while acting as a free trigger for 'cards played' scaling synergies.

note_history.note: 0-cost skill offering temporary Dexterity. Great for free block scaling while acting as a free trigger for 'cards played' scaling synergies.
note_history.reason: Played for free Dex and to trigger Serpent Form
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R1: 'play all my 0-cost cards to trigger Serpent Form's random damage'

note: Massive damage multiplier for poison decks. Causing all accumulated poison to trigger an extra time drastically shortens lethal boss fights.

note_history.note: Massive damage multiplier for poison decks. Causing all accumulated poison to trigger an extra time drastically shortens lethal boss fights.
note_history.reason: Multiplied poison damage for fast kill
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R1: 'Accelerant is a massive damage multiplier for a poison deck, making all accumulated poison tick twice'

note: Innate, unplayable curse that clogs the starting hand. Essential to pair with discard outlets like Acrobatics or Survivor to clear it efficiently and mitigate its impact.

note_history.note: Innate, unplayable curse that clogs the starting hand. Essential to pair with discard outlets like Acrobatics or Survivor to clear it efficiently and mitigate its impact.
note_history.reason: Innate dead draw handled via discard
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R1: 'Folly (Curse, cost=-1): Unplayable. Innate. Ethereal. Eternal.'

note: Crucial utility for carrying block over. Highly valuable to retain, letting you deploy it precisely to bridge defense into an aggressive damage turn.

note_history.note: Crucial utility for carrying block over. Highly valuable to retain, letting you deploy it precisely to bridge defense into an aggressive damage turn.
note_history.reason: Retained to bank block across turns
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R5: 'Blur is essential for banking block for future turns'

note: Deals strong damage and returns 3 random cards from the discard pile to your hand before exhausting. Great for replaying high-value skills or powers.

note_history.note: Deals strong damage and returns 3 random cards from the discard pile to your hand before exhausting. Great for replaying high-value skills or powers.
note_history.reason: Played to trigger a boss phase and recur discarded cards.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R3: 'use Neow's Fury+ to kill the boss... while returning cards from the discard pile.'

note: 0-cost utility that instantly strips all Block and Artifact from an enemy while applying Vulnerable. Essential for cracking tough defensive targets.

note_history.note: 0-cost utility that instantly strips all Block and Artifact from an enemy while applying Vulnerable. Essential for cracking tough defensive targets.
note_history.reason: Used to strip defensive layers and increase attack damage for free.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R2: 'We weave in Expose for free Vulnerable'

note: Provides constant passive AoE poison scaling. Excellent for maintaining poison stacks and slowly stripping artifact charges off enemies over time.

note_history.note: Provides constant passive AoE poison scaling. Excellent for maintaining poison stacks and slowly stripping artifact charges off enemies over time.
note_history.reason: Played early to ensure consistent poison application each turn.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R1: 'Play Noxious Fumes+ first... for 6 poison/turn.'

note: Combines direct damage with solid poison application. Perfect for initiating poison on a target to enable subsequent multiplier cards like Bubble Bubble.

note_history.note: Combines direct damage with solid poison application. Perfect for initiating poison on a target to enable subsequent multiplier cards like Bubble Bubble.
note_history.reason: Used to apply initial poison stacks before larger combo pieces.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R1: 'Deadly Poison and Poisoned Stab+ start stacking poison'

note: Applies a massive 12 poison for 1 energy, provided the target is already poisoned. The ultimate poison accelerator for melting high-HP bosses.

build_role_observations.evidence: Applied massive poison stacks to rapidly scale damage and trigger Outbreak.

note_history.note: Applies a massive 12 poison for 1 energy, provided the target is already poisoned. The ultimate poison accelerator for melting high-HP bosses.
note_history.reason: Used to exponentially increase poison on a boss.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R3: 'Bubble Bubble+ massively increases poison.'

note: Turns poison application into devastating AoE damage. Every 3 times you apply poison, it triggers a huge AoE hit, scaling heavily with multi-application cards.

build_role_observations.evidence: Converted rapid poison applications into massive AoE damage, applying +Outbreak(30).

note_history.note: Turns poison application into devastating AoE damage. Every 3 times you apply poison, it triggers a huge AoE hit, scaling heavily with multi-application cards.
note_history.reason: Played to convert frequent poison applications into scaling AoE damage.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R1: 'Outbreak+ provides long-term AoE damage scaling based on our poison application'

note: Incredible 1-cost skill that provides decent block while drawing 3 cards. Vital for extending turns, digging for answers, and setting up complex combos.

note_history.note: Incredible 1-cost skill that provides decent block while drawing 3 cards. Vital for extending turns, digging for answers, and setting up complex combos.
note_history.reason: Used repeatedly to efficiently block and draw deeper into the deck.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R2: 'Play Mad Science to generate 8 block and draw 3 cards.'

note: An unplayable Ethereal curse. It will exhaust itself at the end of the turn you draw it, but until then it wastes a draw and clogs your hand.

note_history.note: An unplayable Ethereal curse. It will exhaust itself at the end of the turn you draw it, but until then it wastes a draw and clogs your hand.
note_history.reason: Drawn in opening hand, limiting available options.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R1: in hand as 'Clumsy (Curse, cost=-1): Unplayable. Ethereal.'

note: An unplayable status card that clogs your hand and draw pile. Unlike Slimed or Dazed, it does not exhaust naturally, making it a permanent dead draw.

note_history.note: An unplayable status card that clogs your hand and draw pile. Unlike Slimed or Dazed, it does not exhaust naturally, making it a permanent dead draw.
note_history.reason: Generated by enemy attacks and sat unplayable in hand.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R6: in hand 'Wound (Status, cost=-1): Unplayable.'

note: Solid 1-cost attack providing straightforward burst damage. Useful for pushing damage efficiently while setting up larger combo engines, though it lacks scaling with Shiv synergies.

note_history.note: Solid 1-cost attack providing straightforward burst damage. Useful for pushing damage efficiently while setting up larger combo engines, though it lacks scaling with Shiv synergies.
note_history.reason: Played as a simple damage nuke alongside shivs to deal upfront damage.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R3: Using Cloak and Dagger with Shivs provides immediate burst damage... Ultimate Strike continues the burst.

note: 0-cost block card that scales well with Dexterity. Perfect for rapidly incrementing card-play counters (like Panache, Iron Club, or Serpent Form) while defending, without draining your energy.

note_history.note: 0-cost block card that scales well with Dexterity. Perfect for rapidly incrementing card-play counters (like Panache, Iron Club, or Serpent Form) while defending, without draining your energy.
note_history.reason: Used as a free block and an easy trigger for Iron Club/card play counts.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R3: played Deflect+ for free block. Since our Iron Club counter is at 3, playing this card will draw 1 card

note: Solid utility attack that applies 1 Weak. Cost-effective mitigation against big incoming boss or elite attacks while still contributing to damage.

note_history.note: Solid utility attack that applies 1 Weak. Cost-effective mitigation against big incoming boss or elite attacks while still contributing to damage.
note_history.reason: Used explicitly to apply Weak and mitigate incoming boss damage.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R9: 'Sucker Punch provides 8 damage and 1 Weak, which is excellent for mitigating incoming boss damage'

note: 2-cost attack that reduces your next Skill's cost to 0. Excellent for cheating out expensive utility like Piercing Wail, or keeping tempo high with free enablers.

note_history.note: 2-cost attack that reduces your next Skill's cost to 0. Excellent for cheating out expensive utility like Piercing Wail, or keeping tempo high with free enablers.
note_history.reason: Used to make crucial skills cost 0, such as Piercing Wail+ and Blade Dance.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R1: 'Pounce makes Piercing Wail+ free, completely negating the attacks'

note: Provides block across two turns, double-dipping on Dexterity scaling. Excellent for banking block when the enemy is debuffing to prepare for a known attack next round.

note_history.note: Provides block across two turns, double-dipping on Dexterity scaling. Excellent for banking block when the enemy is debuffing to prepare for a known attack next round.
note_history.reason: Used proactively on a turn where the boss was debuffing to block an impending hit.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R5: 'Dodge and Roll sets up 8 block for next turn when the enemy is likely to attack.'

note: 0-cost Skill providing 2 energy. Perfect for fueling explosive Turn 1 combos, enabling expensive powers, or unloading your hand before it exhausts.

note_history.note: 0-cost Skill providing 2 energy. Perfect for fueling explosive Turn 1 combos, enabling expensive powers, or unloading your hand before it exhausts.
note_history.reason: Used in both combats on Turn 1 to expand energy pool and dump hand effectively.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R1: 'Luminesce provides the energy to play out our entire hand optimally.'

note: Exceptional burst damage in Shiv-heavy decks. Capitalizes heavily on Blade Dance and Cloak and Dagger, turning 1 energy into massive multi-hit damage after playing your Shivs.

build_role_observations.evidence: Dealt 206 traceable damage by capitalizing on turns where many Attacks (Shivs) were played.

note_history.note: Exceptional burst damage in Shiv-heavy decks. Capitalizes heavily on Blade Dance and Cloak and Dagger, turning 1 energy into massive multi-hit damage after playing your Shivs.
note_history.reason: Used as a highly energy-efficient damage nuke following Shiv generation.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R3: Cloak and Dagger+ into the two Shivs... Finisher will hit 3 times for 36 damage

note: Powerful damage multiplier against Weakened enemies, but its 2-cost can make it difficult to play alongside expensive scaling powers or when under heavy defensive pressure.

note_history.note: Powerful damage multiplier against Weakened enemies, but its 2-cost can make it difficult to play alongside expensive scaling powers or when under heavy defensive pressure.
note_history.reason: Consistently drawn but left unplayed due to its 2-cost clashing with survival needs.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 2 R7: held Tracking while spending energy on Leg Sweep and Blade Dance for survival.

note: Unplayable status that guarantees end-of-turn damage. Can quickly overwhelm your HP if you lack discard outlets or sufficient mitigation during drawn-out fights.

note_history.note: Unplayable status that guarantees end-of-turn damage. Can quickly overwhelm your HP if you lack discard outlets or sufficient mitigation during drawn-out fights.
note_history.reason: Cluttered hand and guaranteed unavoidable damage during defensive turns.
note_history.trace_citation: Combat 1 R3: I have 4 Burns in hand so I will take 8 damage no matter what.
